narrative:
Madison (precinct in Highland County) has 1,181 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
